SELECT json.text(data) FROM json_test WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json.text(data) FROM json_test WHERE LENGTH(data) > 0;
CREATE TABLE json_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data CLOB);
INSERT INTO json_data (id, data) VALUES (1, json '["a", "b", "c"]');
INSERT INTO json_data (id, data) VALUES (2, json '["d", "e", "f"]');
SELECT json.text(data) FROM json_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT json.text(data) FROM json_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM json_data WHERE id < 3);
CREATE TABLE json_nested (id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_array CLOB);
INSERT INTO json_nested (id, json_array) VALUES (1, json '[1, 2, [3, 4, 5], 6]');
SELECT json.text(json_array) FROM json_nested WHERE id = 1;
SELECT json.text(data) FROM json_nested JOIN json_data ON json_data.id = json_nested.id WHERE json_data.id = 1;
SELECT json.text(data) FROM json_test WHERE data LIKE '%[1,%';
